note: All figures from official adopted budgets and bond referendum documents.

projects.title: Water & Sewer Infrastructure
projects.description: Upgrades to water treatment plants, sewer lines, pump stations, and aging pipe replacements to support population growth and maintain system reliability.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: GoDurham Transit Expansion
projects.description: New buses, transit facility improvements, and expanded service routes for the GoDurham city bus system.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Stormwater Improvements
projects.description: Stormwater drainage upgrades, stream restoration, and flood-prevention infrastructure to protect Durham neighborhoods.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Street Repaving Program
projects.description: Resurfacing and reconstruction of city streets, prioritizing the most deteriorated roads to reduce long-term maintenance costs.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Parks – Lead Soil Remediation
projects.description: Removal of lead-contaminated soil at city parks identified in a 2024 survey. Priority project to protect children's health at public playgrounds.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Sidewalk Repairs & Access
projects.description: Repairs and new sidewalk construction to improve pedestrian safety and ADA accessibility throughout Durham.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Other Capital Projects
projects.description: Facilities improvements, fire station renovations, technology infrastructure, and other capital investments across city departments.
projects.sourceLabel: City of Durham FY2025-26 Adopted Budget
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout City of Durham

projects.title: Affordable Housing Bond Program
projects.description: Durham County's landmark $160 million affordable housing bond, approved by voters in November 2022. Funds affordable housing development, down-payment assistance, and preservation of existing affordable units across the county.
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout Durham County

projects.title: Durham Public Schools Capital Improvements
projects.description: Annual county appropriation for DPS capital improvements — school building repairs, HVAC replacements, roofing, and facility upgrades not covered by the 2022 school construction bond. Separate from the current expense allocation.
projects.locationNote: Program-level estimate — projects occur throughout Durham County
